name: Dijon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees.
2. Cut each breast into two pieces and place on a wooden cutting board. Pound with a meat mallet or the side of a rolling pin until 1/2 inch thick.
3. Heat margarine in a large frying pan. Add garlic and cook for 2 minutes over medium heat.
4. Brown chicken pieces for 3 minutes on each side.
5. Transfer chicken to a 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
6. In the frying pan, combine wine, water, mustard, dill weed, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil and cook for 1 minute.
7. Pour the sauce over the chicken in the baking dish.
8. Cover and bake for 30 minutes.
9. Add parsley; baste the chicken with the sauce and continue cooking for 5 more minutes.
Food Exchanges per serving: 4 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGES; CAL: 223; CHO: 2g; PRO: 27; FAT: 9g; SOD: 235; CHO: 73; Low-Sodium diets: Omit salt.
